sapBdc.headerSubtitle: Unlock the Future of Data with SAP Business Data Cloud
sapBdc.unifyTitle: Unify Your Enterprise Data From Finance to Frontline
sapBdc.unifyDesc: Rialtes helps you connect and harmonize enterprise data across your business applications. With SAP Business Data Cloud, we enable you to integrate
listItems: Finance, Procurement, and Supply Chain Data from SAP S/4HANA
Workforce and Payroll Intelligence from SAP SuccessFactors
Sales, Service, and Marketing Insights from Salesforce or SAP CX
sapBdc.listDesc: Whether you’re optimizing profitability, driving operational efficiency, or delivering personalized customer experiences, SAP Business Data Cloud, implemented by Rialtes, gives you a unified and contextualized view of your enterprise landscape.
sapBdc.dataTitle: A Unified, Open Data Foundation for Intelligent Enterprises
sapBdc.dataSubtitleOne: SAP Business Data Cloud enhances enterprise data management by combining SAP’s data platform capabilities with native integration for SAP applications and compatibility with third-party platforms like Databricks, Google BigQuery, and Snowflake. It enables the unification of business context and data for real-time insights and AI-driven decisions.
sapBdc.dataSubtitleTwo: As a SAP Authorized Partner and a Databricks Strategic Partner, Rialtes empowers organizations to seamlessly adopt SAP Business Data Cloud and unlock the full value of their enterprise data.
sapBdc.fabricSubtitle: Powered by SAP Business Data Cloud
sapBdc.fabricDesc: The SAP Data Fabric acts as a smart, connected data layer across your organization. It provides a consistent foundation for accessing, modeling, and governing enterprise data with business context intact.
sapBdc.fabricPara: With SAP Data Fabric, you can:
fabricList: Connect live and replicated data across multi-cloud and hybrid landscapes
Unify semantic definitions across domains and systems
Ensure trusted data governance and lineage across all business functions
Accelerate AI, planning, and analytics with clean, context-rich data
sapBdc.sapTitle: Why Choose SAP Business Data Cloud?

dataItems.title: Business-Ready Data
dataItems.desc: Access and connect data from SAP and non-SAP systems while retaining rich business semantics and context.

dataItems.title: Open Ecosystem Integration
dataItems.desc: Integrate with industry leaders like Databricks, BigQuery, and AWS using open standards and APIs.

dataItems.title: Unified Governance & Security
dataItems.desc: Manage data securely across all layers with enterprise-grade governance and lineage.

dataItems.title: AI & ML Enabled
dataItems.desc: Power advanced analytics and AI-driven scenarios using embedded machine learning services.

sapBdc.partnerTitle: Rialtes: Your Trusted SAP & Databricks Partner
sapBdc.partnerDesc: Rialtes specializes in data cloud architecture, implementation, and governance with a team of SAP-certified engineers. We integrate process intelligence, data engineering, and cloud development to deliver measurable value from your enterprise data. Our certified teams assist you in:
partnerList: Finance, Procurement, and Supply Chain Data from SAP S/4HANA
Workforce and Payroll Intelligence from SAP SuccessFactors
Sales, Service, and Marketing Insights from Salesforce or SAP CX
sapBdc.migrationTitle: Seamless Migration from SAP Business Warehouse to SAP Business Data Cloud
sapBdc.migrationPara: Modernize your analytics and accelerate cloud transformation:

exploreData.title: Assessment & Roadmapping
exploreData.desc: Analyze your existing SAP BW models and data flows to build a tailored migration strategy

exploreData.title: Automated Data Replication
exploreData.desc: Use SAP-provided migration tools and Rialtes accelerators to transition existing logic and semantics to SAP Business Data Cloud.

exploreData.title: Preserve Business Logic
exploreData.desc: Retain existing business metadata and KPIs for faster time-to-value.

exploreData.title: Improve Performance & Agility
exploreData.desc: Leverage cloud-native capabilities for real-time data consumption and visualization.

sapBdc.migrateTitle: Migrate from SAP Datasphere to SAP Business Data Cloud
sapBdc.migrateDesc: SAP Business Data Cloud brings the next-generation capabilities of Datasphere under a unified data architecture. Rialtes makes this transition frictionless:

migrateData.title: Data Mapping & Reconciliation
migrateData.description: We help map your current artifacts and pipelines from SAP Datasphere to SAP Business Data Cloud

migrateData.title: Business Context Retention
migrateData.description: Ensure all metadata, lineage, and context are preserved during the shift

migrateData.title: Open Extension
migrateData.description: Connect to external platforms like Databricks for advanced analytics and ML integration.

migrateData.title: Future-Proof Architecture
migrateData.description: Establish a foundation for scalable AI, reporting, and cross-system data modeling.

sapBdc.databricksTitle: Connect SAP Business Data Cloud with Databricks
sapBdc.databricksDesc: As a certified Databricks consulting partner, Rialtes helps you:
connectSapData: Establish bi-directional data pipelines between SAP and Databricks
Use Delta Lake and MLFlow with SAP semantic models
Enable real-time predictive insights using SAP business context
Create industry-specific AI models using unified data across platforms
sapBdc.dataCloud: Our SAP Business Data Cloud Services

ourSapData.title: Consulting & Advisory
ourSapData.description: Align your data strategy with business objectives and cloud roadmaps.

ourSapData.title: Implementation & Migration
ourSapData.description: From BW and Datasphere to Business Data Cloud with full lifecycle support.

ourSapData.title: Managed Services & Optimization
ourSapData.description: 24x7 support, data quality monitoring, and optimization for performance and cost.

whyClientsData: Accelerators for BW and Datasphere Migration
Industry-Specific Data Frameworks for Life Sciences,Retail, Automotive & More
sapBdc.contactTitle: Let’s Build Your Enterprise Data Cloud Together
sapBdc.SubTitle: Talk to our SAP Data Cloud experts today and begin your journey with Rialtes.

salesforceDataCloud.headerSubtitle: Harness the Potential of Salesforce Data Cloud
salesforceDataCloud.headerDesc: Drive automation, predictive, and generative AI, as well as analytics, within the world’s leading AI-powered CRM
salesforceDataCloud.pageDesc1: Businesses are flooded with vast amounts of data from an increasing array of systems, sources, and platforms. The sheer scale and diversity of this data can be overwhelming, leaving organizations to manage and navigate through countless records daily.
salesforceDataCloud.pageDesc2: Salesforce Data Cloud is designed to assist businesses in consolidating customer data from various touchpoints. Combining data from multiple sources helps create a unified 360-degree view of each customer, fostering more personalized and effective marketing campaigns.
salesforceDataCloud.creatingTitle: Creating Personalized & Impactful Customer Experiences for Your Business
salesforceDataCloud.unitedTitle: Unite Your Entire Organization around Delivering an Enhanced Customer Experience.
salesforceDataCloud.contactTitle: Take the next step to operational excellence with us.

featureBoxes.title: Customer 360 View
featureBoxes.description: Integrate customer data across business units to build, for both real-time, omni-channel marketing, transactional personalization, content, subscription, and e-commerce.

featureBoxes.title: Zero Copy Integration
featureBoxes.description: Connect your databases, applications with zero copying delays and share data among multiple data sources on demand. No ETL, eliminate ingestion costs and keeping down operational costs.

featureBoxes.title: Real-time Data Processing
featureBoxes.description: Processes in real-time and drives data-driven decision-making, optimize inventory management, influence services, improve customer satisfaction, add trusted promotions and recommendations in real-time.

featureBoxes.title: Omnichannel Engagement
featureBoxes.description: Build brand loyalty and trust by ensuring consistent experiences by managing data and service channels.

featureBoxes.title: Privacy and Compliance
featureBoxes.description: Monitor transactions, protect third-party relationships and data usage, adhering to GDPR and CCPA.

featureBoxes.title: Personalized Marketing Campaigns
featureBoxes.description: Leverage unified customer profiles to deliver tailored and timely 1:1 targeted campaigns, seamless and secure omnichannel interactions that drive conversion rates.

stats.description: Companies witnessed a reduction in cost

services.title: Managed Cloud Services
services.description: With a comprehensive suite of managed services for both public, private, and hybrid cloud environments, empower enterprises to optimize their entire cloud infrastructure and applications.

services.title: Private Cloud Services
services.description: Experience the ideal blend of cloud flexibility with the utmost data compliance, and security of private infrastructure - providing you an isolation from the public cloud enterprise workloads.

services.title: Data Cloud Consulting
services.description: Tailored recommendations, best practices and certified expertise in maximizing the value of Salesforce Data Cloud within your organization.

services.title: Data Cloud Migration
services.description: Develop and implement the best practices for securely and efficiently migrate the composition of cloud workloads from any environment with expert assessments and seamless workload migration solutions.

services.title: Data Cloud Implementation
services.description: Set up the necessary infrastructure, configure data sources, and ensure that your organization can fully utilize Salesforce Data Cloud.

datasphere.headerSubtitle: Unleash the Power of AI-Driven Data Lakes with Rialtes & SAP Datasphere
datasphere.pageDescTitle: Future-Proof Your Business with Intelligent Data Consolidation, AI Insights, and Seamless Integration
datasphere.pageDesc1: In today’s competitive landscape, data is the new currency. Yet, most organizations struggle with fragmented data spread across multiple systems like SAP, Salesforce, Oracle, and more. Rialtes, as a certified SAP partner, offers cutting-edge SAP Datasphere services to consolidate and harmonize your enterprise data, unlocking real-time AI-powered insights that drive value and innovation.
datasphere.pageDesc2: With deep expertise in SAP Datasphere and AI-led data architecture, we turn your data sprawl into a powerful, unified asset — creating a future-ready, intelligent enterprise.
datasphere.whyRialtesSubTitle: Your AI-Powered SAP Datasphere Partner for End-to-End Success
whyrialtessectiondata: Complete lifecycle services: Consulting, Design, Implementation, Integration, and Post-Go-Live AI Optimization.
Industry-first AI/ML data models and accelerators for rapid value realization.
Tailored integrations with SAP S/4HANA, SuccessFactors, Ariba, Salesforce, Oracle, and more.
Real-time data governance, compliance, and security frameworks.
Offices in the US, Canada, Singapore, and India, delivering global expertise with local precision.
industryAcceleratorsData: AI-powered Manufacturing production and inventory optimization.
Semiconductor-specific yield, demand, and supply chain analytics.
Automotive customer lifecycle and parts analytics.
Retail customer behavior, inventory, and sales insights.
Education student lifecycle analytics and faculty insights.
HR workforce performance and diversity analytics.
buildIntelligentData: Centralized, AI-ready data lakes combining SAP and non-SAP applications.
Seamless, real-time data pipelines for live analytics and AI/ML models.
Full data lineage, governance, and compliance support.
Future-proof platform for AI/ML predictive and prescriptive analytics.
datasphere.buildTitle: Build an Intelligent Data Lake with SAP Datasphere
datasphere.unlockTitle: Unlock End-to-End Visibility and Actionable AI Insights
datasphere.buildDesc: Data consolidation shouldn’t be a bottleneck — it should be a growth catalyst. Rialtes uses SAP Datasphere to unify all your critical enterprise data into a powerful data lake, eliminating silos and enabling AI/ML insights at scale.
datasphere.industrySubTitle1: Fast-Track AI Success in Your Industry
datasphere.industrySubTitle2: Pre-Built Connectors & AI Models to Accelerate Your Transformation
datasphere.industryDesc: Rialtes’ pre-delivered accelerators make AI data consolidation seamless and impactful. Designed specifically for Manufacturing, Semiconductor, Automotive, Retail, Education, and HR industries, these plug-and-play solutions help you gain immediate business value.
intelligentData: Seamless integration of dealer, customer, IoT/telematics, and ERP data.
Predictive maintenance, warranty management, and AI-based customer retention.
Insights for new product development and targeted marketing campaigns.
datasphere.intelligentTitle: Intelligent Automotive Data Lakes — Transform Vehicle Data into AI-Driven Value
datasphere.intelligentSubTitle: Drive the Future of Automotive with AI-Integrated Insights
datasphere.intelligentDesc: Unlock AI for better vehicle performance, customer experience, and market growth.
aiReadyData: AI-driven predictive maintenance, yield forecasting, and supplier analytics.
Unified supply chain, production, and demand data for real-time decisions.
Real-time KPI dashboards to drive operational excellence and cost savings.
datasphere.aiReadySubTitle2: Optimize Production, Supply Chain, and Maintenance
datasphere.aiReadyDesc: Stay competitive with AI-powered, data-driven manufacturing intelligence.
omniSectionData: Consolidated view of customer, sales, inventory, and marketing data.
AI/ML-powered segmentation, churn prediction, and demand forecasting.
Real-time stock and fulfillment analytics to improve margins.
educationSectionData: AI-driven analytics for student retention, performance, and engagement.
Faculty productivity, curriculum insights, and administrative reporting.
Financial performance and compliance analytics made easy.
datasphere.omniDesc: Empower retail with hyper-personalized experiences and optimized operations.
datasphere.smartEducationSubTitle1: From Enrollment to Alumni — AI-Powered Student Journeys
datasphere.smartEducation: Future-proof education with AI insights to enhance student outcomes.
aiPoweredData: Unify employee data across SuccessFactors, Oracle, Workday, and more.
AI-driven analytics for recruitment, retention, diversity, and workforce planning.
datasphere.aiPoweredHrDesc: Take HR to the next level with AI-powered talent management and compliance.

AI for predictive sourcing, supplier scoring, and risk analysis.

datasphere.aiPoweredUseDesc: AI brings the future of decision-making to your fingertips.

solutionSuccess.title: RISE with SAP

solutionSuccess.title: GROW with SAP

solutionSuccess.description: SuccessFactors provides end-to-end global HCM transformation, automating HR processes to keep employees engaged and aligned with organizational needs, all while easing the workload for HR leaders.
productsDetails: SAP HR Analytics and Workforce Planning

solutionSuccess.title: SAP Ariba
solutionSuccess.description: Transform your procurement strategy to enhance innovation and value through spend management, strategic sourcing, and cost savings, while improving operations, decision-making, and contract management

sapConsulting.pageDescTitle: Leverage SAP Consulting Services for Reliable Business Operations
sapConsulting.pageDesc: What matters the most is – effort. SAP Implementation Consulting with us helps you grow your business exponentially and limit your struggles tangentially. We understand your requirements and offer you just the right amount of it.
sapConsulting.sapInustryTitle: SAP Industry Focused Solutions Tailored to Meet the Needs of Different Organizations
sapConsulting.riseWithSapDesc: Simplify the business of transformation through a customizable, subscription-based “as a service” model that empowers you to move to the cloud and S/4HANA at your own pace. As an SAP Gold Partner, we bring deep SAP application, business process, and technology expertise to help you take full advantage of RISE.
sapConsulting.contactTitle: Take the next step to operational excellence with us.
